PUPPET_FILE
  PsiComment(COMMENT)('# https://docs.puppet.com/puppet/latest/reference/lang_data_default.html')
  PsiWhiteSpace('\n\n')
  PsiPuppetIfStatementImpl(IF_STATEMENT)
    PsiElement(IF)('if')
    PsiPuppetConditionalBranchImpl(CONDITIONAL_BRANCH)
      PsiPuppetExpressionParenImpl(EXPRESSION_PAREN)
        PsiElement(()('(')
        PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
        PsiPuppetExpressionCompImpl(EXPRESSION_COMP)
          Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
            PsiElement($)('$')
            PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('osfamily')
          PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
          PsiElement(==)('==')
          PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
          PsiPuppetDefaultWrapperImpl(DEFAULT_WRAPPER)
            PsiElement(DEFAULT)('default')
        PsiElement())(')')
      PsiWhiteSpace('\n')
      PsiPuppetBracedStatementsBlockImpl(BRACED_STATEMENTS_BLOCK)
        PsiElement({)('{')
        PsiWhiteSpace('\n  ')
        PsiPuppetFunctionCallStatementImpl(FUNCTION_CALL_STATEMENT)
          PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
            PsiElement(NAME)('notice')
          PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
          Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
            PsiElement($)('$')
            PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('osfamily')
        PsiWhiteSpace('\n')
        PsiElement(})('}')
    PsiWhiteSpace('\n')
    PsiElement(ELSE)('else')
    PsiWhiteSpace('\n')
    PsiPuppetBracedStatementsBlockImpl(BRACED_STATEMENTS_BLOCK)
      PsiElement({)('{')
      PsiWhiteSpace('\n  ')
      PsiPuppetFunctionCallStatementImpl(FUNCTION_CALL_STATEMENT)
        PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
          PsiElement(NAME)('notice')
        PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
        PsiPuppetDefaultWrapperImpl(DEFAULT_WRAPPER)
          PsiElement(DEFAULT)('default')
      PsiWhiteSpace('\n')
      PsiElement(})('}')
  PsiWhiteSpace('\n\n')
  PsiPuppetResourceDefaultStatementImpl(RESOURCE_DEFAULT_STATEMENT)
    PsiPuppetCapitalizedNameWrapperImpl(CAPITALIZED_NAME_WRAPPER)
      PsiElement(CAPITALIZED_NAME)('File')
    PsiPuppetBracedAnyArgumentsListBlockImpl(BRACED_ANY_ARGUMENTS_LIST_BLOCK)
      PsiElement({)('{')
      PsiWhiteSpace('\n  ')
      PsiPuppetResourceArgumentsListImpl(RESOURCE_ARGUMENTS_LIST)
        PsiPuppetArgumentImpl(ARGUMENT)
          PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
            PsiElement(NAME)('name')
          PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
          PsiElement(=>)('=>')
          PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
          PsiPuppetDefaultWrapperImpl(DEFAULT_WRAPPER)
            PsiElement(DEFAULT)('default')
      PsiWhiteSpace('\n')
      PsiElement(})('}')
  PsiWhiteSpace('\n\n')
  PsiPuppetCaseExpressionImpl(CASE_EXPRESSION)
    PsiElement(CASE)('case')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
      PsiElement($)('$')
      PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('osfamily')
    PsiPuppetBracedCaseOptsBlockImpl(BRACED_CASE_OPTS_BLOCK)
      PsiElement({)('{')
      PsiWhiteSpace('\n  ')
      PsiPuppetCaseOptionImpl(CASE_OPTION)
        PsiPuppetCaseValuesImpl(CASE_VALUES)
          PsiPuppetQuotedTextImpl(QUOTED_TEXT)
            PsiElement(SINGLE_QUOTED_STRING)(''win'')
          PsiElement(,)(',')
          PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
          PsiPuppetDefaultWrapperImpl(DEFAULT_WRAPPER)
            PsiElement(DEFAULT)('default')
        PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
        PsiElement(:)(':')
        PsiPuppetBracedStatementsBlockImpl(BRACED_STATEMENTS_BLOCK)
          PsiElement({)('{')
          PsiWhiteSpace('\n    ')
          PsiPuppetFunctionCallStatementImpl(FUNCTION_CALL_STATEMENT)
            PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
              PsiElement(NAME)('notice')
            PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
            Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
              PsiElement($)('$')
              PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('osfamily')
          PsiWhiteSpace('\n  ')
          PsiElement(})('}')
      PsiWhiteSpace('\n')
      PsiElement(})('}')
  PsiWhiteSpace('\n\n')
  Puppet: NODE_DEFINITION
    PsiElement(NODE)('node')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiPuppetNodeNamesListImpl(NODE_NAMES_LIST)
      PsiPuppetDefaultWrapperImpl(DEFAULT_WRAPPER)
        PsiElement(DEFAULT)('default')
    PsiPuppetBracedStatementsBlockImpl(BRACED_STATEMENTS_BLOCK)
      PsiElement({)('{')
      PsiWhiteSpace('\n\n')
      PsiElement(})('}')
  PsiWhiteSpace('\n\n')
  PsiPuppetResourceDeclarationImpl(RESOURCE_DECLARATION)
    PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
      PsiElement(NAME)('file')
    PsiPuppetBracedResourceByClassnameContentsBlockImpl(BRACED_RESOURCE_BY_CLASSNAME_CONTENTS_BLOCK)
      PsiElement({)('{')
      PsiWhiteSpace('\n  ')
      Puppet: RESOURCE_INSTANCE_DECLARATION
        PsiPuppetDefaultWrapperImpl(DEFAULT_WRAPPER)
          PsiElement(DEFAULT)('default')
        PsiElement(:)(':')
        PsiWhiteSpace('\n    ')
        PsiPuppetResourceArgumentsListImpl(RESOURCE_ARGUMENTS_LIST)
          PsiPuppetArgumentImpl(ARGUMENT)
            PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
              PsiElement(NAME)('ensure')
            PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
            PsiElement(=>)('=>')
            PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
            PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
              PsiElement(NAME)('exists')
      PsiWhiteSpace('\n')
      PsiElement(})('}')
  PsiWhiteSpace('\n\n')
  PsiPuppetExpressionAssignmentImpl(EXPRESSION_ASSIGNMENT)
    Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
      PsiElement($)('$')
      PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('rootgroup')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiElement(=)('=')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiPuppetSelectorImpl(SELECTOR)
      PsiPuppetHashArrayAccessesImpl(HASH_ARRAY_ACCESSES)
        Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
          PsiElement($)('$')
          PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('facts')
        PsiPuppetHashArrayIndexImpl(HASH_ARRAY_INDEX)
          PsiElement([)('[')
          PsiPuppetQuotedTextImpl(QUOTED_TEXT)
            PsiElement(SINGLE_QUOTED_STRING)(''os'')
          PsiElement(])(']')
        PsiPuppetHashArrayIndexImpl(HASH_ARRAY_INDEX)
          PsiElement([)('[')
          PsiPuppetQuotedTextImpl(QUOTED_TEXT)
            PsiElement(SINGLE_QUOTED_STRING)(''family'')
          PsiElement(])(']')
      PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
      PsiElement(?)('?')
      PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
      PsiPuppetBracedSelectorValuesBlockImpl(BRACED_SELECTOR_VALUES_BLOCK)
        PsiElement({)('{')
        PsiWhiteSpace('\n  ')
        PsiPuppetSelectorValueImpl(SELECTOR_VALUE)
          PsiPuppetQuotedTextImpl(QUOTED_TEXT)
            PsiElement(SINGLE_QUOTED_STRING)(''Solaris'')
          PsiWhiteSpace('          ')
          PsiElement(=>)('=>')
          PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
          PsiPuppetQuotedTextImpl(QUOTED_TEXT)
            PsiElement(SINGLE_QUOTED_STRING)(''wheel'')
        PsiElement(,)(',')
        PsiWhiteSpace('\n  ')
        PsiPuppetSelectorValueImpl(SELECTOR_VALUE)
          PsiPuppetRegexpImpl(REGEXP)
            PsiElement(REGEX)('/(Darwin|FreeBSD)/')
          PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
          PsiElement(=>)('=>')
          PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
          PsiPuppetQuotedTextImpl(QUOTED_TEXT)
            PsiElement(SINGLE_QUOTED_STRING)(''wheel'')
        PsiElement(,)(',')
        PsiWhiteSpace('\n  ')
        PsiPuppetSelectorValueImpl(SELECTOR_VALUE)
          PsiPuppetDefaultWrapperImpl(DEFAULT_WRAPPER)
            PsiElement(DEFAULT)('default')
          PsiWhiteSpace('            ')
          PsiElement(=>)('=>')
          PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
          PsiPuppetQuotedTextImpl(QUOTED_TEXT)
            PsiElement(SINGLE_QUOTED_STRING)(''root'')
        PsiElement(,)(',')
        PsiWhiteSpace('\n')
        PsiElement(})('}')
  PsiWhiteSpace('\n\n')
  PsiPuppetFunctionCallStatementImpl(FUNCTION_CALL_STATEMENT)
    PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
      PsiElement(NAME)('notice')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiPuppetDataTypeImpl(DATA_TYPE)
      PsiPuppetCapitalizedNameWrapperImpl(CAPITALIZED_NAME_WRAPPER)
        PsiElement(CAPITALIZED_NAME)('String')
      PsiPuppetDataTypeParametersBlockImpl(DATA_TYPE_PARAMETERS_BLOCK)
        PsiElement([)('[')
        PsiPuppetDefaultWrapperImpl(DEFAULT_WRAPPER)
          PsiElement(DEFAULT)('default')
        PsiElement(])(']')
  PsiWhiteSpace('\n\n')
  Puppet: CLASS_DEFINITION
    PsiElement(CLASS)('class')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiPuppetFqnContainerImpl(FQN_CONTAINER)
      PsiElement(NAME)('someclass')
    PsiPuppetParenthesizedParametersListBlockImpl(PARENTHESIZED_PARAMETERS_LIST_BLOCK)
      PsiElement(()('(')
      PsiWhiteSpace('\n  ')
      PsiErrorElement:'Default' unexpected
        PsiElement(CAPITALIZED_NAME)('Default')
      PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
      PsiElement($)('$')
      PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('defavultvaluevar')
      PsiWhiteSpace('\n')
      PsiElement())(')')
    PsiPuppetBracedStatementsBlockImpl(BRACED_STATEMENTS_BLOCK)
      PsiElement({)('{')
      PsiWhiteSpace('\n\n')
      PsiElement(})('}')
